use_cases: Displaying achievement badges on user profile pages
Showing certification stamps on product or course completion
Implementing gamification reward systems with tiered levels
Creating award graphics for achievement platforms
Displaying badge collections in gamified applications
ai_summary: A versatile awards and achievement badge component supporting multiple variants including stamp, certificate, badge, and ID card styles. Features level-based color theming (bronze, silver, gold, platinum) and customizable content for recipient names, dates, and descriptions. Designed for implementing achievement systems, certification displays, and gamification features in web applications.
